name: Nacho

lifestyle.notes: Very limited time. Training must be efficient. Travel weeks require hotel gym fallback.

long_term: Transition to Olympic lifting after current program
Build a strength base that supports OLY movement patterns

golden_rules: Deload every 5 weeks (or when load index flags HIGH)
No training through sharp elbow pain — modify or skip

active_injuries.notes: Watch pull volume. Stop any pulling if sharp pain.

health_context.notes: Carb timing matters. Higher carb around training. Avoid large carb meals before sleep.

current_program.name: 30-Week Strength
current_program.notes: Periodized 6-block program. Main lifts: Squat, Bench, Deadlift, OHP.
